cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.description: Dream Log Cookie Policy, learn how we use cookies and similar technologies

whatAreCookies.title: 1. What are Cookies
whatAreCookies.content: Cookies are small text files stored on your device that record your interactions with websites. When you visit Dream Log, we may use cookies and similar technologies to:
purposes: Remember your login status and preferences
Ensure website security and prevent fraud

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.description: These cookies are essential for the website to function properly and cannot be disabled:

functional.title: Functional Cookies
functional.description: These cookies remember your choices and preferences to provide a better user experience:

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: These cookies help us understand how users use the website to improve service quality:
items: Page visit statistics and user behavior analysis
Feature usage frequency and error monitoring
Performance optimization and user experience improvement

thirdParty.title: 4. Third-Party Cookies
thirdParty.content: We may use the following third-party services that set their own cookies:
services: CDN Services: For accelerating content distribution and improving loading speed
Security Services: To protect against malicious attacks and ensure website security
Analytics Tools: To understand user behavior and improve services (if applicable)
thirdParty.note: These third-party services have their own privacy policies, and we recommend reviewing their policies for details.

browsers.title: Browser Settings
browsers.description: You can manage cookies through your browser settings:
settings: Chrome: Settings → Privacy and security → Cookies and other site data
Firefox: Options → Privacy & Security → Cookies and Site Data

impacts.title: Impact Notice
impacts.description: Disabling cookies may affect the following features:
items: Unable to maintain login status, requiring re-login
Some features may not work properly
Website performance and user experience may decline

otherTech.title: 6. Other Tracking Technologies
otherTech.content: In addition to cookies, we may use the following technologies:
technologies: Local Storage: Store application settings and temporary data
Session Storage: Temporary data storage during sessions
Web Beacons: Used for statistics and analysis (if applicable)
Fingerprinting: Device feature recognition for security protection

dataProtection.title: 7. Data Protection
dataProtection.content: We take the following measures to protect data collected through cookies:
measures: All sensitive cookies are stored with encryption
Regular cleanup of expired and unused cookie data
Strict control of access permissions for cookie data
Follow the principle of minimizing data collection
Will not sell cookie data to third parties

updates.title: 8. Policy Updates
updates.content: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect:
reasons: Launch of new features and services
updates.notification: Important updates will be notified to users through website notifications or email.

contact.title: 9. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about our cookie usage, please contact us:

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.description: Dream Log Disclaimer, understand the risks and limitations of liability for using our services

serviceNature.title: 1. Service Nature Statement
serviceNature.content: Dream Log is a dream recording and analysis platform designed to provide entertainment and self-exploration tools for users. Please note:
points: Non-Medical Service: This platform does not provide medical diagnosis, treatment, or professional psychological counseling services
Entertainment Nature: All analysis results are for entertainment and personal reference only
AI Limitations: AI analysis is based on algorithms and data models, cannot replace human professional judgment
Personal Interpretation: Dreams are highly personalized, and analysis results vary from person to person

contentAccuracy.title: 2. Content Accuracy Disclaimer
contentAccuracy.content: Regarding the content and analysis results provided by the platform:
points: Accuracy: We do not guarantee the complete accuracy or applicability of AI analysis results
Completeness: Analysis results may not be comprehensive, with omissions or deviations
Timeliness: Algorithms and databases are continuously updated, historical analysis results may become outdated
Subjectivity: Dream interpretation involves subjective judgment, different theories may lead to different conclusions
Cultural Differences: Analysis may not fully consider cultural backgrounds and personal experience differences

healthDisclaimer.title: 3. Health and Mental Health Disclaimer
healthDisclaimer.content: If you have any of the following conditions, please seek professional help instead of relying on this platform:
conditions: Sleep Disorders: Chronic insomnia, frequent nightmares, or severely declining sleep quality
Mental Health: Depression, anxiety, PTSD, or other psychological problems
Mental Illness: Any form of mental illness or related symptoms
Medication Effects: Taking medications that affect sleep or mental state
Emergency Situations: Having thoughts of self-harm or harming others
healthDisclaimer.warning: ⚠️ Important Reminder: If you have mental health issues, please seek professional medical help immediately!

technicalDisclaimer.title: 4. Technical Service Disclaimer
technicalDisclaimer.content: Regarding the limitations and risks of technical services:
points: Service Availability: Does not guarantee 24/7 uninterrupted service operation
Data Loss: Although backup measures are taken, data loss risks cannot be excluded
Compatibility: May not be fully compatible with certain devices or browsers
Network Dependency: Requires stable network connection, network issues may affect usage
Update Impact: System updates may temporarily affect functionality or change interface

userBehavior.title: 5. User Behavior Disclaimer
userBehavior.content: We are not responsible for the following user behaviors:
points: Misuse of Service: Using analysis results for inappropriate purposes or important decisions
Over-reliance: Over-dependence on AI analysis while ignoring real life
Information Disclosure: Users voluntarily sharing sensitive personal information with others
Account Security: Account theft or abuse due to user negligence
Illegal Use: Using the platform for illegal or harmful activities

thirdPartyContent.title: 6. Third-Party Content Disclaimer
thirdPartyContent.content: The platform may contain third-party content or links:
points: External Links: Not responsible for content or services of external websites
User-Generated Content: Not responsible for content shared by other users
Advertising Content: If any advertising, accuracy or reliability is not guaranteed
Partners: Third-party service providers have independent responsibilities and obligations

lossesAndDamages.title: 7. Losses and Damages Disclaimer
lossesAndDamages.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, we do not assume the following losses:
losses: Direct Losses: Direct economic losses caused by using or being unable to use the service
Indirect Losses: Indirect losses such as profit loss, goodwill damage, data loss
Emotional Damage: Emotional distress or psychological trauma caused by service content
Decision Consequences: Consequences of making decisions based on platform analysis results
Third-Party Losses: Any losses or damages caused to third parties

applicableLaw.title: 8. Applicable Law and Jurisdiction
applicableLaw.content: Application and interpretation of this disclaimer:
points: Applicable Law: Subject to the laws and regulations of the People's Republic of China
Jurisdiction: Disputes shall be under the jurisdiction of Zhengzhou People's Court, Henan Province
Legal Conflicts: If conflicts with mandatory legal provisions, legal provisions shall prevail
Partial Invalidity: Invalidity of partial provisions does not affect the validity of other provisions

userConfirmation.title: 9. User Confirmation
userConfirmation.content: Using Dream Log services indicates that you confirm:
confirmations: Have fully understood the content of this disclaimer
Agree to bear the related risks of using the service
Will not use platform analysis results for important decisions
Will seek professional help when health problems arise
Understand the entertainment nature and limitations of the service

contact.title: 10. Contact Information
contact.content: If you have questions about this disclaimer, please contact us:
contact.note: This disclaimer takes effect from the date of publication, and we reserve the right to modify it at any time.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.description: Dream Log Privacy Policy, understand how we collect, use and protect your personal information
privacyPolicy.keywords: Privacy Policy,Personal Information Protection,Data Security,Dream Log

collection.title: 1. Information Collection
collection.content: We collect the following types of information:
types: Account Information: Username, email address, password (encrypted storage)
Dream Content: Dream records, tags, and related data you actively submit
Usage Data: Access times, feature usage, device information
Technical Information: IP addresses, browser types, operating system information

usage.title: 2. Information Usage
usage.content: We use the collected information for:
purposes: Provide dream recording and analysis services
Improve user experience and service quality
Comply with legal and regulatory requirements

protection.title: 3. Information Protection
protection.content: We take the following security measures to protect your information:
measures: Sensitive information uses AES-256 encryption for storage
Regular security audits and vulnerability scanning
Strict access control and permission management
Data backup and disaster recovery mechanisms

sharing.title: 4. Information Sharing
sharing.content: We will not sell, rent, or otherwise disclose your personal information to third parties unless:
exceptions: Required by laws and regulations or government departments
To protect our legitimate rights and interests
In emergency situations to protect user or public safety

userRights.title: 5. User Rights
rights: Access Right: View personal information we hold about you
Rectification Right: Request correction of inaccurate personal information
Erasure Right: Request deletion of your personal information
Restriction Right: Restrict processing of your personal information

cookies.title: 6. Cookie Usage
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar technologies to:
purposes: Remember your login status and preferences
cookies.note: You can manage cookies through browser settings, but this may affect the normal use of some features.

retention.title: 7. Data Retention
retention.content: We will retain your information according to the following principles:
policies: Dream data: Deleted within 30 days after user actively deletes or account cancellation
Other retention periods required by law

contact.title: 8. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or need to exercise your rights, please contact us through:

updates.title: 9. Policy Updates
updates.content: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. For major changes, we will:
notifications: Post update notices in prominent positions on the website
updates.acceptance: Continuing to use our services indicates that you accept the updated privacy policy.

termsOfService.title: Terms of Service
termsOfService.description: Dream Log Terms of Service, understand the rules and conditions for using our services
termsOfService.keywords: Terms of Service,User Agreement,Usage Rules,Dream Log

serviceIntro.title: 1. Service Introduction
serviceIntro.content: Dream Log (hereinafter referred to as "we" or "the service") is an AI-powered dream recording and analysis platform. We provide users with:

userResponsibilities.title: 2. User Responsibilities
userResponsibilities.content: When using this service, you need to:
responsibilities: Provide true and accurate registration information
Properly safeguard account information, do not share with others
Comply with laws and regulations of the People's Republic of China
Do not publish illegal, harmful, or inappropriate content
Respect others' privacy and intellectual property rights
Do not conduct malicious attacks or damage system security

serviceRules.title: 3. Service Rules
serviceRules.content: To ensure service quality and user experience, we have established the following rules:
rules: Content Standards: Prohibit publishing illegal, violent, pornographic, defamatory content
Usage Limits: Reasonable limits on daily API calls and storage space
Account Security: Accounts may be suspended or restricted when abnormal activity is detected
Data Backup: Users are advised to regularly back up important data

intellectualProperty.title: 4. Intellectual Property
provisions: Platform Rights: Dream Log's trademarks, interface designs, codes, etc. belong to us
User Content: You retain ownership of your original dream records and other content
Usage Authorization: You authorize us to use your content for providing services
Infringement Handling: Please contact us if infringement is discovered

disclaimer.title: 5. Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: Please note the following disclaimer terms:
disclaimers: Service Nature: This service is for entertainment and reference only, does not constitute professional medical advice
Accuracy: AI analysis results are for reference only, complete accuracy not guaranteed
Availability: May be temporarily interrupted due to maintenance or upgrades
Third Parties: Not responsible for third-party links or services
Data Loss: Although we take measures to protect data, technical failure risks cannot be excluded

changesAndTermination.title: 6. Service Changes and Termination
policies: Feature Updates: We may update or adjust service functions at any time
Advance Notice: Major changes will be notified 30 days in advance
Account Termination: Accounts violating terms may be suspended or terminated
Data Export: Users may apply to export personal data before termination
Service Termination: 90 days advance notice will be given if service is terminated

disputeResolution.title: 7. Dispute Resolution
disputeResolution.content: In case of disputes, we suggest:
suggestions: Friendly Negotiation: Prioritize dispute resolution through negotiation
Customer Service: Seek help through customer service channels
Legal Remedies: If negotiation fails, seek legal remedies according to law
Jurisdiction: Disputes shall be under jurisdiction of Zhengzhou People's Court, Henan Province

applicableLaw.title: 8. Applicable Law
applicableLaw.content: This Terms of Service applies to the laws and regulations of the People's Republic of China, including but not limited to:
laws: Civil Code of the People's Republic of China
Cybersecurity Law of the People's Republic of China
Personal Information Protection Law of the People's Republic of China
Data Security Law of the People's Republic of China

contact.title: 9. Contact Information
contact.content: If you have questions about this Terms of Service, please contact us:

effectiveness.title: 10. Terms Effectiveness
effectiveness.content: This Terms of Service takes effect from the date of publication. By registering an account or using this service, you indicate that you have read, understood, and agree to comply with all contents of these terms.
effectiveness.updates: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time, and the modified terms will be published on the website and take effect from the date of publication.
